title: ratibida tagetes
intro: Ratibida tagetes, also known as Prairie Coneflower or Mexican Hat, is a flowering plant native to the southwestern United States and Mexico. The medicinal properties of Ratibida tagetes include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to its high concentration of flavonoids and terpenoids. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Ratibida tagetes can be used to make herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to promote digestive health and alleviate menstrual cramps.
